settings.editor: Empowering Your Vision with High-Impact Software Development.

list_items.accordion_title: How long does it take to develop a custom software application?
list_items.item_description: The timeline varies based on complexity. A simple MVP (Minimum Viable Product) usually takes 2–4 months, while larger enterprise platforms may take 6 months or more.
